raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "Energy Adaptation mode not properly handled for users with high adenosine levels", "recommended_fix": "Add a check for adenosine levels in the energy-picker component and adjust the mode accordingly"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "issue": "GDPR Article 22 consent screen not properly validated", "recommended_fix": "Add validation for the GDPR Article 22 consent screen to ensure it is properly filled out"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/assessment/pre-assessment-summary.tsx", "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py"]}

findings.issue: Energy Adaptation mode not properly handled for users with high adenosine levels
findings.recommended_fix: Add a check for adenosine levels in the energy-picker component and adjust the mode accordingly

findings.issue: GDPR Article 22 consent screen not properly validated
findings.recommended_fix: Add validation for the GDPR Article 22 consent screen to ensure it is properly filled out
